title: microthlaspi umbellatum
intro: Microthlaspi umbellatum, also known as pennycress, is a small, annual plant belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Microthlaspi umbellatum include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to aid in digestion and reduce fever. Microthlaspi umbellatum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory and gastrointestinal issues.
